context: Role of PET/CT in Breast Cancer PET-CT useful ONLY in (a)  inflammatory breast cancer (b)  > 3 cm large breast cancer (c)  stage II/III breast cancer Staging of Breast Cancer √  40% of breast primaries NOT visualized √  61% sensitive + 80% specific for axillary nodes √  unsuspected disease detected in mediastinal / internal mammary lymph nodes in 30% √  92-100% sensitive for recurrence, 72-82% specific (changes with time interval since therapy) √  PET/CT may change clinical management in 36% High SUV Values in Breast Cancer Distant Metastases in Breast Cancer Soft-tissue lesion:   mediastinal
